zh.lifeSummary: 當Malcolm Crawford於1461年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼時，他的父親Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford21歲，母親Marjory Barclay16歲。他於1469年之後與Marion Crichton在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1500年5月7日在他的家鄉享年39歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭諾斯 艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malcolm Crawford于1461年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼时，他的父亲Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford21岁，母亲Marjory Barclay16岁。他于1469年之后与Marion Crichton在英国苏格兰度福利爾桑哈爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1500年5月7日在他的家乡享年39岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰諾斯 艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼。

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: Malcolm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Malcolm Crawford was born in 1461, in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford, was 21 and his mother, Marjory Barclay, was 16. He married Marion Crichton after 1469, in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 7 May 1500, in his hometown, at the age of 39, and was buried in Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malcolm Crawford est né en 1461, à Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Marjory Barclay, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Marion Crichton après 1469, à Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 7 mai 1500, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Scotland, Uni: Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Malcolm Crawford 1461 in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford 21 und seine Mutter Marjory Barclay 16. Er hat nach 1469 in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Marion Crichton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 7. Mai 1500 im Alter von 39 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm Crawford è nato il nel 1461 nel Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Marjory Barclay, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Marion Crichton dopo il 1469, nel Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 7 maggio 1500, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Malcolm Crawfordが1461年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルバーニーで生まれた時，父Malcolm FitzJohn Crawfordは21歳，母Marjory Barclayは16歳であった。1469年以後にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアサンクハーでMarion Crichtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1500年5月7日に故郷で39歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドノース エイルシュアイアキルバーニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Malcolm Crawford(이)가 1461년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬비른이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjory Barclay(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1469년 이후 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 산크하르에서 Marion Crichton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1500년 5월 7일 그의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 노르스 에이르실르 킬비른이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm Crawford nasceu em 1461, em Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Marjory Barclay, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Marion Crichton após 1469, em Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 7 de maio de 1500, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malcolm Crawford родился в 1461 г. в местности килбирни, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Marjory Barclay, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Marion Crichton после 1469 г. в местности санкухар, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 7 мая 1500 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности килбирни, норт аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Marion Crichton después de 1469, en Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos.
